_comment: exp_022 — GRPO pass 4 from the pass-3 merged model. SINGLE intentional change from exp_019 (the pass-3 recipe): the curriculum. Same G=4, T=1.0, max_completion=5120, lr=2e-5, beta=0.01, length_bonus. The new curriculum (curriculum_pass4.json) is sampled from the pass-3 policy at the matched training-time per-token distribution (top_k disabled / top_p=1.0 / T=1.0, N=8), produced by scripts/launch_difficulty_pass3.sh + scripts/filter_curriculum_v2.py. Hypothesis: every prior pass sampled at top_k=20 but trained at top_k=None — that distribution mismatch was baked into every curriculum we've ever used. Closing it should raise the in-band-prompt fraction and reduce the dead-step rate without touching the optimizer recipe.
_curriculum_note: Build with: python scripts/filter_curriculum_v2.py --in data/difficulty_samples_pass3.jsonl --out experiments/exp_022_grpo_pass4/curriculum_pass4.json --min-correct 2 --max-correct 6 --max-length 5120 --ff-mcq-ratio 2.0. The band [2,6] at N=8 is p_correct in [0.25, 0.75] (max within-G=4 variance band). --max-length 5120 matches training's max_completion_length so 'allow_clipped=False' filters at the training budget. Sample target after filter: 60-100 prompts (similar to exp_019's 88).

length_bonus.note: Same as exp_015/exp_019. Continuous descent from 0.05 at len=0 to 0.0 at cap; guarantees nonzero reward_std even when discrete reward terms collapse across the 4 generations in a group.

_ref_model_note: ref_model intentionally unset — TRL defaults ref=base_model=pass-3 GRPO. Do NOT override to pass-2 or earlier (would pull policy backward).

vllm._note: Kaggle inference config after training. Use cse151b-notebook with model_id=output_repo (after running merge_and_push.ipynb to merge the adapter).
